designersNotes: We took the elastic-waist pant and elevated it. These are high-rise pants beloved for their unmatched comfort and refined look. They’re made with Crepette™ — our one-of-a-kind Japanese crepe fabric beloved for its subtle texture, breezy drape and the fact that it basically never wrinkles.

This is a longsleeve polo with a relaxed fit. It's made with InterLock Cotton — 100% cotton, ideal for everyday wear. Double-knit, interlock construction gives this fabric a refined, soft yet structured feel. This version features an exclusive, custom-designed stripe pattern.
